mapper.select: SELECT id, provider, key_value, is_active, description, last_used, created_at, updated_at FROM api_keys ORDER BY provider
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO api_keys (provider, key_value, is_active, description) VALUES (#{provider}, #{keyValue}, #{isActive}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE api_keys SET key_value = #{keyValue}, is_active = #{isActive}, description = #{description}, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE provider = #{provider}
